steps.title: Identify the causal mechanism in the notes
steps.content: The task asks what causes meanders. The notes explain the mechanism: erosion and redeposition from one side of the riverbank to the other. The answer must directly state what this mechanism produces.

steps.title: Apply the mechanism to the answer choices
steps.content: The correct answer directly explains what causes meanders—erosion and redeposition form them. Choices B, C, and D either reverse the cause-and-effect relationship, describe existing meanders without explaining formation, or discuss how meanders migrate. That confirms A is correct.
